steps.title: Identify the distinguishing details
steps.content: The notes reveal that the two compositions incorporate different types of Native elements: Live On, Heart of My Nation uses a Choctaw hymn, while Fantasy Aborigine No.3 incorporates a Tewa seashell rattle.

steps.title: Choose the response that directly contrasts them
steps.content:
C uses parallel structure to explicitly show how each piece incorporates Native traditions differently: one “does so by featuring a Choctaw hymn” and the other “does so by incorporating a Tewa seashell rattle.”
  • A merely lists the compositions
  • B mentions both element types without attaching them to specific pieces
  • D vaguely alludes to different approaches without demonstrating them
.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
